title: gilliesia cuspidata
intro: Gilliesia cuspidata is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, commonly known as the mountain iris. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gilliesia cuspidata include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing respiratory tract irritations. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
